match.userMessage:
Static locked eye-level frame holds on Scarlett leaning against the sun-bleached rock, lips moving as she speaks softly into the clipped microphone. Gentle tide steadily rises around the rock base, water lapping and foam spreading across wet sand.

Scarlett delivers her line with minimal head movement, gaze steady toward the horizon, posture relaxed against the rock.

Ocean breeze lightly flutters her linen shirt fabric while fine mist drifts from incoming waves.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping rocks, soft coastal breeze. water gently rising and lapping against rocks.
